rationale: Gov't Code §2001.005 governs indexing of agency rules, orders, and decisions. The proposed change is a statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not an agency rule, so this section does not apply.
quote: A state agency rule, order, or decision made or issued on or after January 1, 1976, is not valid or effective against a person or party, and may not be invoked by an agency, until the agency has indexed the rule, order, or decision and made it available for public inspection as required by this chapter.
_note: No conflict; proposed change is legislative, not an agency rule. Any implementing agency rules would independently need indexing under §2001.005, but that is routine.
